mapper.sql: sg.ID, sg.SDQJ, sg.GPH, sg.XM, sg.BGQF, sg.SZBM, sg.SZKS, sg.YHZH, sg.BT_YH, sg.BTKC_SQ, sg.KC_YYF, sg.KC_SDF, sg.KC_BX, sg.KC_SDS, sg.KC_QT, sg.KC_LF, sg.JBGZ, sg.YFGZ, sg.SFGZ, sg.BZMC, sg.JBGZ_input

${tAlias}.ID as ${tAlias}_ID, ${tAlias}.SDQJ as ${tAlias}_SDQJ, ${tAlias}.GPH as ${tAlias}_GPH, ${tAlias}.XM as ${tAlias}_XM, ${tAlias}.BGQF as ${tAlias}_BGQF, ${tAlias}.SZBM as ${tAlias}_SZBM, ${tAlias}.SZKS as ${tAlias}_SZKS, ${tAlias}.YHZH as ${tAlias}_YHZH, ${tAlias}.BT_YH as ${tAlias}_BT_YH, ${tAlias}.BTKC_SQ as ${tAlias}_BTKC_SQ, ${tAlias}.KC_YYF as ${tAlias}_KC_YYF, ${tAlias}.KC_SDF as ${tAlias}_KC_SDF, ${tAlias}.KC_BX as ${tAlias}_KC_BX, ${tAlias}.KC_SDS as ${tAlias}_KC_SDS, ${tAlias}.KC_QT as ${tAlias}_KC_QT, ${tAlias}.KC_LF as ${tAlias}_KC_LF, ${tAlias}.JBGZ as ${tAlias}_JBGZ, ${tAlias}.YFGZ as ${tAlias}_YFGZ, ${tAlias}.SFGZ as ${tAlias}_SFGZ, ${tAlias}.BZMC as ${tAlias}_BZMC, ${tAlias}.JBGZ_input as ${tAlias}_JBGZ_input
mapper.insert: insert into swm_gdgz (ID, SDQJ, GPH, XM, BGQF, SZBM, SZKS, YHZH, BT_YH, BTKC_SQ, KC_YYF, KC_SDF, KC_BX, KC_SDS, KC_QT, KC_LF, JBGZ, YFGZ, SFGZ, BZMC, JBGZ_input) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sdqj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gph,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{xm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bgqf,jdbcType=BIT}, #{szbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{szks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{yhzh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{btYh,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{btkcSq,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{kcYyf,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{kcSdf,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{kcBx,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{kcSds,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{kcQt,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{kcLf,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{jbgz,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{yfgz,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{sfgz,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{bzmc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jbgzInput,jdbcType=DECIMAL})
mapper.update: update swm_gdgz set ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, SDQJ = #{sdqj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GPH = #{gph,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, XM = #{xm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BGQF = #{bgqf,jdbcType=BIT}, SZBM = #{szbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SZKS = #{szks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, YHZH = #{yhzh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BT_YH = #{btYh,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, BTKC_SQ = #{btkcSq,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, KC_YYF = #{kcYyf,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, KC_SDF = #{kcSdf,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, KC_BX = #{kcBx,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, KC_SDS = #{kcSds,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, KC_QT = #{kcQt,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, KC_LF = #{kcLf,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, JBGZ = #{jbgz,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, YFGZ = #{yfgz,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, SFGZ = #{sfgz,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, BZMC = #{bzmc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, JBGZ_input = #{jbgzInput,jdbcType=DECIMAL}
mapper.select:
select
from swm_gdgz sg where RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( sg.GPH ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) and left(sg.SDQJ, 4) = #{year, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY sg.SDQJ
